name: Natural Wood Kids' Nightstand - Pillowfort™
description: Enhance the functionality of your kid's room with this Natural Wood Kids' Nightstand from Pillowfort™. Supported by a wooden frame, this nightstand features a wooden tabletop in a square shape with rounded corners for safety. Designed in a brown hue to match a variety of decor themes, this nightstand also has an open circular shelf at the bottom to organize toys, books and other frequently used items.
